title: oenothera hardhamiae
intro: Oenothera hardhamiae, also known as Hardham's evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oenothera hardhamiae include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting cardiovascular well-being, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various conditions. Oenothera hardhamiae can be prepared for medicinal use through cold-pressing of the seeds to extract the oil, which can be used in capsule form, as a dietary supplement, or applied topically to the skin.
